SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF DENISE R. KOHNE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS MAE C. WOO TRUSTEE OF THE WOO FAMILY TRUST AND THE WOO FAMILY TRUST ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOHNE, DENISE R. DBA ELLE-MEME RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO, MAE C. DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE: FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOHNE, DENISE R. DBA ELLE-MEME AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, MAE C. TRUSTEE OF THE WOO FAMILY TRUST

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2017 - CONTINUED FOR THE FILING OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO THE WOO FAMILY TRUST TO MAY-25-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IN OPEN COURT AND UNDER OATH THE PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THT BOTH DEFENDANTS WERE SERVED AT THE SAME TIME BUT THAT ONLY ONE PROOF OF SERIVCE WAS FILED. THE COURT INTRUCTS THE PLAINTIFF TO FILE THE PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO THE WOO FAMLIT TRUST AND A DECLARATION BY THE PERSON WHO SERVED STATING THAT SHE SERVED MAE C. WOO AS TO MAE C. WOO TRUSTEE OF THE WOO FAMLIY TRUST AND THE WOO FAMLIY TRUST. NO NEW PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED. PLAINTIFF DENISE R. KOHNE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
